item.title: Foyle Young Poets of the Year Award 2026
item.description: Poetry submission deadline, 6 PM ET. Any theme, up to 40 lines. Open worldwide, ages 11 to 17. Free. AI-written poems barred. · Unknown · confirmed · active

item.title: Polar Expressions Summer Writing Contest 2026
item.description: Submission deadline. Poetry up to 48 lines or a short story up to 750 words. Open to Canadian residents of all ages, with a division for ages 15 and under. Free. · Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: R.A. Butler Prize in Politics and International Studies
item.description: Submission deadline, projected from the annual July window. Politics or international studies essay, up to 3000 words. Penultimate-year students worldwide. Free. Trinity College, Cambridge. Confirm the date on the site. · Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: The Concord Review
item.description: Rolling deadlines, next August 1 for the Winter issue. History research essay, roughly 4000 to 21000 words. Secondary students worldwide, sole author. Seventy US dollar submission fee. Publishes about five percent. · Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Trinity College Cambridge Subject Essay Prizes
item.description: Submission deadline, projected from the summer window. Subject essays in English, law, history, philosophy, and more, around 2000 to 2500 words. Year 12 and 13 students worldwide. Free. Some prizes skip a year, confirm each on the site. · Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.description: Location unconfirmed · Lieu non confirmé · Toronto · unconfirmed · active

item.description: Second deadline, August 3, workshops, open papers, and posters, with roundtables to November 1. Boston, January 2027. · Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: New York Times Summer Reading Contest
item.description: Submission window, June 5 to August 14, open now. Respond to anything in the Times that drew you in. Open worldwide, ages 13 to 19, middle and high school. Free. Part of the recurring Learning Network contest calendar. · Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Association of American Law Schools 2027 Annual Meeting
item.description: Section calls vary, projected; confirm with the organizer. Legal education, theme Emancipate Academic Freedom. New York, January 2027. Confirm on the site. · Unknown · unconfirmed · active

item.title: Renaissance Society of America, Philadelphia 2027
item.description: Submission deadline, August 15. Renaissance and early-modern sessions and papers. RSA members, sessions need a degree-holding presenter. Philadelphia, March 2027. · Unknown · unconfirmed · active
